title: Bare Bones x Small Ships
description: Bare Bones textures for Small Ships mod ! ⛵
body:
![Bare Bones x Small Ships logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da17e9fe36a4e8bc05436b5180ff6dad1c7c4d6f.png)
-----------

This resource pack adds Bare Bones textures to [Small Ships](https://modrinth.com/mod/small-ships) mod !

- I highly recommend using [Bare Bones x Mods](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-mods) instead of this pack - It's a more convenient way to use my Bare Bones compatibility packs !
